feed.title: Oslo Gig Guide

entry.content:
Venue: KAFÉ HÆRVERK
Start: 2026-05-26 22:00
Tags: Techno, electro, alternative


DJ WhoreMore er endelig tilbake med sin originale, morsomme og geniale musikksmak.

DJ L.I.T.S.W.D. spiller også.

Forvent det uforventede.

ID: 20 CC: Gratis


Tickets:
entry.summary: SKJULTE SKATTER #45: DJ WHOREMORE // Kafé Hærverk at KAFÉ HÆRVERK on 2026-05-26 22:00
entry.title: SKJULTE SKATTER #45: DJ WHOREMORE // Kafé Hærverk (2026-05-26)

entry.content:
Venue: Vulkan Arena
Start: 2026-10-03 16:00
Tags: club, 80s, 90s & early 2000s music, dj


🎉 Bed By 10: The Ultimate 30+ Clubbing Experience! 🎉

You Asked. We Listened. We’re Coming, Oslo!

Fancy going out for a dance but not keen on sacrificing the next day? We’ve got you covered!

Bed By 10 is a chance for ravers over 30 to relive the peak of the 80s, 90s & early 2000s clubbing scene! Expect crazy visuals, confetti showers, Co2 cannons and more as our resident DJ spins all the club classics 🚀

Venue: Vulkan Arena, Vulkan 26, 0178 Oslo, Norway

Time: 4pm – 9pm

Last Entry: 5.30pm

Good vibes only! Our event is designed for those who love to dance, socialize, and enjoy great music—all while being home and in bed by 10PM✨

IMPORTANT INFO: • This Is A DJ Club Night, The Artists Pictured In Our Event Artwork Are Not Performing

• This Is An Event Catering To Those Over 30, However, If Friends 25+ Would Like To Attend Then They Are Welcome

CONTACT US: Please contact our Comms Team via the Enquiry Form found on the “Contact Us” page on our website www.likeit-loveit.com/pages/contact-us.

Our Comms Team is based in the UK & aim to respond to all enquires within 48 hours (excluding weekends & UK public holidays).


Tickets: fixr.co
entry.summary: Bed By 10pm Returns To Oslo! at Vulkan Arena on 2026-10-03 16:00
entry.title: Bed By 10pm Returns To Oslo! (2026-10-03)

entry.content:
Venue: Vulkan Arena
Start: 2026-10-11 19:00
Tags: punk, punk-pop, rave


Doors: 19:00 Start: 20:00 Age restriction: 18+

After conquering North America, the boundary-pushing rave-pop collective Little Big is back to dominate Europe. Today, the band announces their massive 24-date European TOUR 2026, kicking off in Oslo on October 11 and bringing their surreal, high-energy live show across 13 countries.

The tour announcement arrives as the band gears up for a massive 2026, including their brand-new single "DAS ADIDAS" dropping globally on May 15, leading up to their highly anticipated new full-length album slated for Fall 2026.

Additional dates across Spain, Italy, Moldova, and France will be announced in Phase Two.

Little Big is a Los Angeles-based rave-pop collective that has completely redefined the intersection of music and viral internet culture. Originally formed in Saint Petersburg and driven by the explosive creative core of frontman Ilya “Ilich” Prusikin and vocalist Sonya Tayurskaya, the band delivers a sensory overload of heavy electronic beats, absurdist visuals, and razor-sharp satirical storytelling. With a global reputation for riotous live performances, Little Big transforms every stage into a high-octane rave, blending hardcore energy with inescapable pop hooks.

They have consistently pushed boundaries through massive collaborations with global artists - ranging from Oliver Tree, Tommy Cash, and Dillon Francis to recent heavy-hitters like Amazingblaze, Lil Texas, and Sophie Powers’ alter ego Pixl Girl. This relentless creative output has built a catalogue surpassing 4 billion total views across platforms. Their 2018 smash hit “SKIBIDI” became a global cultural phenomenon, racking up over 781 million views, while their 2020 single “UNO” made history as the most-viewed video in Eurovision history with over 301 million views.

In March 2022, following their outspoken opposition to Russia's invasion of Ukraine, the band relocated from Moscow to Los Angeles, continuing to expand their international footprint and turning their art into a powerful platform of defiance.


Tickets: ticketshop.store
entry.summary: Little Big at Vulkan Arena on 2026-10-11 19:00
entry.title: Little Big (2026-10-11)

entry.content:
Venue: John Dee
Start: 2026-12-01 19:00
Tags: bluesrock, hardrock


New York-bandet The Last Internationale kommer tilbake til John Dee 1. desember!

Bluesrock-duoen har flere kritikerroste album bak seg, og er kjent som et fantastisk liveband. De har delt scene med legender som Robert Plant, Neil Young og The Who for å nevne noen – og Tom Morello fra Rage Against the Machine er stor fan:

«The Last Internationale are one of my favorites in the next wave of rebel rockers. They’re raw and real and mix East Village rock sensibilities with Battleship Potemkin firepower.»

De har også turnert med Deep Purple, Kiss og Guns N’ Roses, og spilt på de fleste av de store hardrock-festivalene i Europa.

--

Bill. kr. 355,- + bill.avg.

18 års aldersgrense med legitimasjonsplikt. Ingen vergeordning. Gyldig legitimasjon er fysisk nasjonalt ID-kort, pass, fysisk førerkort eller bankkort med bilde. Digital legitimasjon (digitalt førerkort eller Bank-ID) eller bilde av legitimasjon er ikke gyldig legitimasjon.

Arrangementet har ståplasser.

Dørene åpner kl. 19.00. Arrangementet starter ca. 1 time etter dørene åpner. NB! Det anbefales å komme i god tid før arrangementet starter da det kan bli kø.


Tickets: www.ticketmaster.no
entry.summary: The Last Internationale at John Dee on 2026-12-01 19:00
entry.title: The Last Internationale (2026-12-01)
